Interface ShelterApplicationService

All Known Implementing Classes:
ShelterApplicationServiceImpl
public interface ShelterApplicationService
Application service for shelter management use cases. Orchestrates underlying service calls to register, update, remove, and list shelters, ensuring audit logging and consistency across operations.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Shelter>
    listShelters()
    Returns a list of all registered shelters in the system.
    Shelter
    registerShelter(String name, String location, int capacity)
    Registers a new shelter with the given name, location, and capacity.
    void
    removeShelter(String shelterId)
    Removes a shelter from the system by ID.
    Shelter
    updateShelter(String shelterId, String name, String location, Integer capacity)
    Updates an existing shelter's information with the provided values.

  • Method Details

    • registerShelter

      Shelter registerShelter(String name, String location, int capacity)
      Registers a new shelter with the given name, location, and capacity. Throws an exception if a shelter with the same name and location already exists.
      Parameters:
      name - the shelter name; must not be null or blank
      location - the shelter location; must not be null or blank
      capacity - the maximum number of animals the shelter can hold; must be positive
      Returns:
      the newly created Shelter

    • listShelters

      List<Shelter> listShelters()
      Returns a list of all registered shelters in the system. Returns an empty list if no shelters have been registered.
      Returns:
      a list of all shelters

    • updateShelter

      Shelter updateShelter(String shelterId, String name, String location, Integer capacity)
      Updates an existing shelter's information with the provided values. Only non-null parameters are applied; omitted (null) fields retain their current values. Throws an exception if the shelter is not found.
      Parameters:
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter to update; must not be null or blank
      name - the new name, or null to keep the current value
      location - the new location, or null to keep the current value
      capacity - the new capacity, or null to keep the current value
      Returns:
      the updated Shelter

    • removeShelter

      void removeShelter(String shelterId)
      Removes a shelter from the system by ID. Throws an exception if the shelter is not found, still holds animals, or has pending transfer requests.
      Parameters:
      shelterId - the ID of the shelter to remove; must not be null or blank
